_comment: Mission/Vision/Approach. Wording preserved from the original site (one typo fix: 'to addresses' -> 'to address'). The three Approach pillars restate the original 'integrated cycle' sentence as Design / Manufacture / Characterize; the descriptors recombine the source wording and add no new claims.

mission.text: We seek to understand and develop more durable and sustainable materials, with a focus on materials for load-bearing and heat-resistant applications.

approach.intro: We work in an integrated cycle of innovation that designs, manufactures, and characterizes materials.

pillars.title: Design
pillars.text: We design materials for load-bearing and heat-resistant applications.

pillars.title: Manufacture
pillars.text: We manufacture those materials through advanced processing.

pillars.title: Characterize
pillars.text: We characterize them to build fundamental understanding.

approach.closing: Throughout, we seek fundamental understanding about materials to address critical challenges in aerospace, energy, medicine, and beyond.
